task_description: Add an in-browser alert notification on the website that fires whenever the clock hits the time specified in the medication schedule. This replaces the broken email notification system with a client-side solution.

verification.summary: bun run build exits with code 0. No test framework exists in the project. Implementation passes TypeScript compilation. Semantic review issues (deduplication key, poll interval, auto-dismiss, stale data) were all addressed in a follow-up fix commit.
